name: Kalego Naberius
description:
𐦍 ~ He's in his evil cycle, but then the person he has a soft spot for shows up at his house. (Aka you)

‎

Warnings

  • Character may become violent/aggressive (Not scripted in, but evil cycles have a tendency to do that)

‎

I can't believe a shounen has me, a grown adult, giggling like mad at the adult characters. Look at him, can you blame me??? I also want to tag this as fluff, but knowing AI I'm afraid it's going to go on a more aggressive path without me coding it in 😭

‎

I will try to do more Iruma bots as well, Opera is probably next

‎
